line: <a class="brand" href="{{ url_for('home') }}" title='Back to {{ site.name|e }}'>
{% for item in navigation if item.visible %}
<input id="query" name="q" type="search" value="{{ request.args.q|default('')|e }}" placeholder="e.g. nebula ✨">
<input type="checkbox" name="topic" value="{{ topic.slug }}" {% if topic.slug in selected_topics %}checked{% endif %}>
{% if page.subtitle is string and page.subtitle|length > 0 %}
Stories from around the world: São Paulo, Zürich, and 東京.
{% if visible_articles is iterable and visible_articles|length %}
{% if article.author is not none %}by {{ article.author.name }}{% endif %}
Try removing a filter or searching for “ocean”.
